pi_items.source: Web search confirms Aetna Better Health is a real health insurance company (Medicaid managed care plans)

Web search confirms PO Box 982960 El Paso, TX 79998 is the verified mailing address for Aetna Better Health of Florida (https://www.aetnabetterhealth.com/content/dam/aetna/medicaid/florida/pdf/abhfl_enrollee_notice_new_claims_address.pdf)
Confirmed as correct city for Aetna Better Health PO Box 982960
Confirmed as correct state for Aetna Better Health PO Box 982960 in El Paso
Confirmed as correct zip code for all Aetna Better Health PO Boxes in El Paso, TX (including 982960, 982964, 982966, 982973)
Web search found no results for this phone number. Similar Aetna Better Health numbers found: 800-306-8612 (Texas), 800-441-5501 (Florida). This specific number appears in no public documentation.

This number is a synthetic/fictional phone number per North American Numbering Plan (NANP). The 555-0100 to 555-0199 range is officially reserved for entertainment/advertising and fictional use (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fictitious_telephone_number, https://tvtropes.org/pmwiki/pmwiki.php/Main/FiveFiveFive). This is NOT a real Aetna fax number.

Web search confirms 60054 is Aetna's universal payer ID used across all clearinghouses nationwide for most Aetna plans including Aetna Better Health (https://www.claim.md/payer/60054, https://yung-sidekick.com/blog/what-is-payer-id-60054-a-simple-guide-for-healthcare-billing)

privileged_info_summary: The task references Aetna Better Health, a real Medicaid managed care insurance company. The address PO Box 982960, El Paso, TX 79998 is verified as the actual mailing address for Aetna Better Health of Florida. The payer ID 60054 is Aetna's verified universal payer ID used across all clearinghouses. However, the fax number 860-555-0199 is explicitly a fictional number within the NANP-reserved range (555-0100 to 555-0199) for synthetic/test use, and the phone number 800-306-0337 cannot be verified through any public source and does not match documented Aetna customer service numbers.
